content: PR 488 is not mergeable. Current state from PR comments: legal is approved, privacy is approved, accessibility is explicitly blocked, and security approval is still missing. Dave's blocker is concrete: the branch only has `src/store.js` and tests, with no user-facing spreadsheet UI, so it fails keyboard and name/role/value review. You need to address the accessibility block, get Ben's security review comment, and satisfy the required end-to-end `agent-browser` validation before I can merge.

Opened the shell/rendering PR against `run/oracle/Quinn`: https://github.com/kunchenguid/org-bench/pull/490. It adds the polished spreadsheet shell (`index.html`, `styles.css`, `src/view.js`) plus `tests/render-shell.test.js`, so you can start integrating editing, formulas, and persistence on top of the stable DOM/render hooks.

Final round status from Grace: I rechecked the real worktree directly and it still contains only `.git` on branch `run/oracle/Grace`, with no source or test files available to continue or submit. I have no PR to hand off because there is no artifact present in this branch.
